creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
Same as: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=220367

I found that bug happen then options: LZ4 and XTRADB set together.
All options to build fail:
LZ4
INNOBASE
XTRADB
GSSAPI_NONE

Fail happen only on one of 4 tested installations.
I try to update kernel and world, rebuild all ports - not help.
/etc/make.conf and /etc/src.conf identical on OK and FAIL systems.
